---
title: "Draft Quarto document"
author: "Your Name"
format: html
---

## Header 1

```{r setup}
#| include: false
```

```{r}
library(readr)
```


## Process survey data.
```{r}
survey_tidy <- here::here("data-raw/nurses-stress/survey-results.csv.gz") |>
  read() |>
  tidy_survey_dates()
```

```{r}
survey_long <- survey_tidy |>
  survey_to_long()
```
